reviews.comment:
Espléndida estación de servicio. Ideal para hacer un alto cuando se va viajando por la ruta 9 y/o rutas de acceso a San Pedro. Limpio, amplío, con parques y glorieta, lugar para estacionar, buenos baños. Excelente atención.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service station. Ideal for a stop while traveling on Route 9 and/or access roads to San Pedro. Clean, spacious, with parks and a roundabout, parking, and good restrooms. Excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQwOFBhLVBREAE

reviews.comment:
La atención fue satisfactoria. Los precios muy altos.
Recomiendo la estación que está del otro lado de la ruta.

(Translated by Google)
The service was satisfactory. The prices were very high.
I recommend the station on the other side of the road.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwXzltblh3EAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente trato del personal de playa y ni hablar del café. Las palmeras son lo mas

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the beach staff and the coffee is fantastic. The palm trees are the best.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwMzhPaGFREAE

reviews.comment:
Parada inevitable para relajar y recargar el termo y comer algo rico.

(Translated by Google)
An unavoidable stop to relax, refill your thermos, and eat something delicious.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwbjhtRUNBEAE

reviews.comment:
amplio comodo atención amable, he dejado el auto para salidas y recorridos en bici sin problemas.

(Translated by Google)
Spacious, comfortable, friendly service; I've left the car for bike rides and outings without any problems.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwbjg3ZFFBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención y en el resto la atención de Roberto es estupenda siempre muy bien atento a todo. La comida es muy casera y completa. Recomendación los sandwich de mila

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, and Roberto's attention to detail is always superb; he's very attentive to everything. The food is very homemade and filling. I recommend the milanesa sandwiches.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMweDhDRmxRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar para parar por unos mates y luego seguir de viaje, bien cuidado.

(Translated by Google)
A very nice place to stop for some mate and then continue your journey, well maintained.
